query: SELECT bio, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Norika%' OR hostName LIKE '%Steven%' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT bio, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Norika%' OR hostName LIKE '%Steven%' LIMIT 1;
messages: Hi! We are avid travelers who have been to more than 60 countries, and just set our foot on all seven continents on earth! (Antarctica is a great honeymoon location :). We love hosting friends and have some nice chats over Chinese dinner. Cultural exchange is what I have been doing in life - I have lived in four continents (Shanghai, Copenhagen, Nairobi and Chicago). Come and enjoy a nice meal and good conversations!	We are fairly international! Steven is born and raised in Hong Kong, while Norika from Tianjin. Steven lived abroad in US, Europe, Africa and LATAM before. He has been working in multi-cultural environment with nationalities of more than…50?	Norika is a music pro - she’s a renowned jazz pianist in China!	We love hosting friends as we can share stories and joy over great food. Norika is a good cook, and she’s creative in making great dishes (she can discuss and share techniques with you!)	Geography (ask me how big Shanghai is and I’ll give you a good answer that you can bring home :)
Squash, NBA, cycling, reading and international relations!
